title: Raththam
subTitle: An aloof publication editor is forced to come back to his old workplace after a friend is murdered by a crazy fan.

title: Parking
subTitle: When a parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views, the two men find themselves locked in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.

title: Phamous
subTitle: When a group of men find themselves caught in the crossfires of a seemingly endless game of revenge, they must decide where their loyalties lie.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Dove
subTitle: Anoop and Aditi love each other but face an unexpected obstacle when Anoop gets charged with murder. Meanwhile, Kumar and Sona, who share an intimate relationship, try to overcome their challenges.

title: Damayanthi
subTitle: Vicky has many loans of his father to repay. His mother tells him about a haunted mansion that they own in Devapura. Vicky takes it upon himself to sell the house, which they believe is haunted by Damayanthi's spirit.

title: Mohini
subTitle: Vaishnavi falls in love with Sandeep and they get engaged. Things take a turn when Vaishnavi is possessed by the spirit of Mohini, her look-alike, who wants vengeance from Sandeep's family.

title: Kali Kitaab
subTitle: When narratives from a cryptic book spring to life, a woman experiences bizarre phenomena and resolves to uncover the identity of its enigmatic writer.

title: Gatta Kusthi
subTitle: When wrestling champ Keerthi enters an arranged marriage with a chauvinistic Veera, she scrambles to be a traditional wife while hiding her true self.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: Varun, an NRI medical student, and Bhanu, a vivacious young woman, fall in love with each other. However, they face many personal differences, creating complications in their relationship.

title: Guardian
subTitle: A woman who was never avenged returns from the dead to terrify and terrorise those who tormented her whilst she was alive.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe, but something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: Indian Soldier Never On Holiday
subTitle: A soldier on holiday witnesses an explosion and manages to catch the culprit. He finds that an entire network of terrorists is operating in the city, and he needs to stop them before it's too late.

title: Kodathi Samaksham Balan Vakeel
subTitle: Balakrishnan, a lawyer, is not successful at his job due to his severe stammer. However, things begin to change when he is entrusted with a deeply complex case.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Velaikkaran
subTitle: A youth from the slums fights to end food adulteration that is being committed by large manufacturing companies.

title: Arjun Reddy
subTitle: A brilliant medical student starts down a self-destructive path after his girlfriend is forced to marry another man.

title: Saamrajya
subTitle: A cop haunted by his brother's disappearance accepts a covert mission to infiltrate a crime syndicate, but discovers its leader is a man from his past.

title: Sindhubaadh
subTitle: Small-time crook Thiru, along with his sidekick, steals from various people instead of selling his house to earn money. One day he meets Venba, a loud, brash woman and eventually marries her.

title: Vikram Vedha
subTitle: Two polar opposites, a righteous cop and a mysterious gangster, meet in an ideological clash.

title: Daaku Maharaaj
subTitle: A daring robber, striving for survival and establishing his own territory amid conflicts with powerful adversaries, battling to become a "king without a kingdom."

title: Petta
subTitle: A look at the secrets guarded by Kaali, who works as a humble hostel warden. When Kaali crosses paths with a group of dangerous gangsters, things take an interesting turn.

title: Petta
subTitle: A look at the secrets guarded by Kaali, who works as a humble hostel warden. When Kaali crosses paths with a group of dangerous gangsters, things take an interesting turn.

title: Satyabhama
subTitle: ACP Satyabhama investigates a missing person case, uncovering dark secrets across shadowy towns. Her past haunts her as she races to find the truth and redemption amidst the high-stakes investigation.

title: Pankh
subTitle: Film highlighting a phenomenon peculiar and exclusive to the Indian film industry, the practise of casting children in roles opposite to their natural genders.

title: 1947: Earth
subTitle: The disaster of Indian/Pakistani partition seen through the eyes of a child - Lenny, an eight-year-old crippled girl - from Lahore, the Punjabi city that saw some of the bloodiest pogroms. The experiences, hopes and fears of this young girl provide an intense portrait of the period.

title: Parking
subTitle: When a parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views, the two men find themselves locked in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.

title: Anjaniputra
subTitle: A small-time businessman hides the fact that he has turned his back on his wealthy family due to a misunderstanding.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: When Satya raises his voice against Guru, the latter revolts and bashes the former to hell. Satya makes a comeback as a cop to take revenge on Guru and put an end to his crime in Kurnool city.

title: Angel
subTitle: A man is shocked when the antique idol that he is trying to smuggle out of the country suddenly comes to life.

title: Main Hi Raja Main Hi Mantri
subTitle: A moneylender is living a happily married life. However, when his wife is insulted by the village sarpanch's wife, he focuses all of his energy on becoming a powerful politician.

title: Housefull 4
subTitle: Three pairs of reincarnated lovers reunite in the present day, but the men wind up falling for the wrong women.

title: Surya's Saturday
subTitle: A unique man who acts upon his anger only one day of the week, Saturdays.
